title: Moscow is profiting from the Iran war for now — but experts say Russia's economy is in the 'death zone'
summary_full: The Iran war has caused energy prices to surge, directly benefiting — and filling the coffers — of major oil and gas producers like Russia.
summary_public: The Iran war has caused energy prices to surge, directly benefiting — and filling the coffers — of major oil and gas producers like Russia.

IR.evidence: Moscow is profiting from the Iran war for now
